mapper.select:
SELECT s.seq, s.refund_request_seq AS refundRequestSeq, s.member_name AS memberName, s.phone_number AS phoneNumber, s.participation_period AS participationPeriod, s.belonging_score AS belongingScore, s.team_impact AS teamImpact, s.difference_comment AS differenceComment, s.improvement_comment AS improvementComment, s.re_enroll_score AS reEnrollScore, s.created_date AS createdDate FROM refund_surveys s
ORDER BY s.created_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
